info.name: HowLongToBeat API
info.description: A high-performance REST API for HowLongToBeat.com data. Includes support for in-memory caching and resilient scraping logic.

query.description: The search query for the game title.
Bypass cache and force a fresh scrape from HLTB (Subject to cooldown).

request.description: Search for games on HowLongToBeat. Returns a list of matches with IDs and basic info.

query.description: Bypass cache and force a fresh scrape from HLTB (Subject to cooldown).

request.description: Fetch in-depth details for a specific game by its HLTB ID, including comprehensive playtimes, community stats, and release info.

response.name: Successful Detail Fetch
